no-restricted-syntax.message: React Compiler does not support try/finally in component or hook render scope. Use Promise.finally or explicit cleanup paths.
React Compiler does not support throw inside try/catch in component or hook render scope. Prefer early returns and callback/onError handling.
React Compiler can fail on optional chaining inside try/catch render scope. Resolve optional values before entering try/catch.
Pass an RN-runtime function reference to `scheduleOnRN` instead of an inline callback.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Avoid double type assertions. Prefer proper type guards or generic typing.
